surfaces.name: Astrid Arena API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth REST API for SN127 Astrid's trading Arena (arena-api.astrid.global) exposing completed competitions, trades, and execution runs; GET /public/arena/completed-competitions returns JSON with no authentication. Documented in the official astridintelligence/sn-127 README.

surfaces.name: Astrid Arena competition wallet-activity dataset
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning the full wallet-activity dataset (totals plus orders/positions/trades records) for a completed SN127 Astrid Arena competition (Miners Showdown 3). The competitionId is sourced from the public completed-competitions endpoint already in this manifest, and the wallet-activity dataset path is documented in the official astridintelligence/sn-127 validator client (src/core/arena/api.ts, fetchAllTrades). Returns application/json; distinct from the completed-competitions API surface.
